    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    R

    recalculate(int) - Method in class control.LimitCalculator
    Fetches the latest spending total, updates the cycle, and recalculates the daily limit.
    recordFailedAttempt() - Method in class control.AuthManager
    Increments the failed-attempt counter and starts a lockout if the maximum number of attempts has been reached.
    refreshPieChart() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Clears and repopulates the pie chart dataset from the current cycle's expenses, grouped by category.
    remainingBalanceLabel - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Label displaying the remaining balance in the current cycle.
    resetCycle() - Method in class app.App
    Permanently deletes the current cycle and all its expense data.
    resetCycle() - Method in class control.CycleManager
    Permanently deletes the current cycle and all its associated data.
    resetCycleButton - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Button to reset (delete) the current budget cycle.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form
